rationale: The proposed change toTax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Educ. Code §28.02591, which governs THECB longitudinal reporting on students graduating via individual graduation committees. No overlap exists.
quote: The Texas Higher Education Coordinating Board, in coordination with the agency, shall collect longitudinal data relating to the post-graduation pursuits of each student who is awarded a diploma based on the determination of an individual graduation committee under Section 28.0258
_note: No conflict; the cited rule addresses education reporting requirements and has no bearing on property tax homestead exemption amounts.
